findings.message: F3 scope is inconsistent: summary says both submission and sync pipelines need async treatment, but task/goals only implement async jobs for submission (`:41`, `TASK-06`) and leave sync synchronous.
Mutex acceptance requires "putIfAbsent semantics" on KV, but Cloudflare KV does not provide atomic compare-and-set; this can fail under race and weakens the core F4 guarantee.
Proposed "fail-open" behavior on KV/mutex failure conflicts with the stated F4 goal (prevent concurrent sync runs) and can silently reintroduce corruption risk during KV outages.
Overall-confidence metadata is inconsistent with the document's own calculation (`:603-605` says ~75%, header still 77%).

IMPLEMENT tasks are listed below the runbook execution threshold (TASK-04/06/07 at 75/65/65), but plan remains active/auto-build; this is process-noncompliant and should be resolved via replan gating before execution.
"Confirmed waitUntil availability" is asserted without repo-local evidence in xa-uploader runtime paths; this should be marked as assumption/verification item, not confirmed fact.
